# SDV Farms — brand assets

Use these files for print, social, email signatures, and app stores.

## Files in this folder (download from GitHub or clone the repo)

| File | Use |
|------|-----|
| `sdv-farms-mark.svg` | App icon style mark (square, green + wheat + SDV) |
| `sdv-farms-wordmark.svg` | Horizontal logo with tagline (white background) |
| `../favicon.svg` | Small favicon (32×32 style) |

**On GitHub:** open a file → **Raw** → right-click → Save As.

## PNG icons (generated by the site)

The live app serves PNGs for PWA / install prompts. Replace `YOUR_DOMAIN` with your production URL (e.g. `https://sdv-farms.vercel.app`).

| Size | URL |
|------|-----|
| 192×192 | `YOUR_DOMAIN/api/icon?size=192` |
| 512×512 | `YOUR_DOMAIN/api/icon?size=512` |

Open the link in a browser → right-click the image → **Save image as…**

## Apple touch icon

- Live: `YOUR_DOMAIN/apple-icon` (Next.js generates 180×180)

## Colours (reference)

| Name | Hex |
|------|-----|
| Deep green | `#175239`, `#0e2c13` |
| Gold / turmeric | `#d4a017`, `#fbbf24` |
